query:
INSERT INTO id_tags (id_tag, user_id, id_tag_type, id_tag_status, label)
SELECT idTag, id, 'APP', 'ACTIVE', 'Tag de la app'
FROM users
WHERE idTag IS NOT NULL AND idTag != ''
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id);
